calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2005 Reset For Jury Trial

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: E. Estacio, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Nasir Patel, Plaintiff In Propria Persona.
Joseph Bravo, Esq. for Defendant, Teddy Jackson.

Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant to vacate and surrender possession of premises located at: 554 Broadway, San Francisco, CA. on of before midnight of 4/30/05.
Plaintiff to pay the defendant the sum of $1,500.00. Exchange of keys and check take place at the office of the property manager by 5/1/05.
If Defendants failed to vacate, Plaintiff will be entitled to the entry of Judgment against Defendants upon as Ex Parte application and declaration with 24-hour notice to Defendants.
Defendant waives right to any stay.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Parties agreed to terms of the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
